title: hephaestus-panel01-fullprompt
prompt:
You are a cinematic concept-art illustrator. Match the style-reference's exact painterly look — cool electric blue/violet shadow, warm gold, orange spark-light, volumetric haze, smooth intentional brushwork. Render clean and finished; treat any grain/noise in the references as draft artifacts to discard.

You are reconstructing ONE finished storyboard frame from a full written spec. Two reference images: IMAGE 1 is the full STORYBOARD PAGE of this scene — use it for the world and the layout of THIS shot (the wide establisher) and for cross-shot consistency; do NOT reproduce its grid, panels, or labels, and IGNORE its draft graininess. IMAGE 2 is the STYLE REFERENCE — the finished look comes ENTIRELY from it: reinterpret and paint this frame fresh in its exact clean painterly concept-art style, palette, and brushwork. Treat any grain or noise in the references as draft artifacts to discard; render clean and intentional, not gritty.

STORY CONTEXT (reason over this): a cast-out smith builds golden beings for others — the only Olympian who ever worked, finally needed, taking quiet pride. Beneath the warmth, the first unease: the line never ends and the figures file away and don't return. This is the OPENING — warm and proud on its face, the darkness only glimpsed.

THE SHOT — WIDE ESTABLISHER: a vast cavernous forge-hall in cool electric-blue and violet gloom, thick with volumetric haze. A long assembly-line conveyor runs from the foreground deep into the frame to a distant vanishing point. Along it stand ranks of identical burnished-gold automata — classical serene blank faces, hand-wrought seams — in stages of completion, dwindling to tiny points in the depth. Overhead, articulated robotic welder-arms arc down over the line, throwing small showers of orange sparks. A tall red furnace column glows mid-right. In the lower-left foreground, small against the scale, the bearded blond smith Hephaestus in a pale cream work-robe off one shoulder bends over his station working a fresh automaton — the one warm human point in the cold machine. Mood: monumental, lonely, the banked heat of an endless forge; proud craft shadowed by something vast.

COMPOSITION: deep one-point perspective down the line; Hephaestus lower-left anchoring scale; ranks and haze carrying the eye to the vanishing point. ONE finished full-frame cinematic image, 16:9 — no grid, no panels, no borders, no text, no labels.
